revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 3일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月初三]][[zh:四月初三]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 3|qq=April 3}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}} . == Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Emperor Bidatsu|en|Emperor Bidatsu|qid=Q316637|lt=Bidatsu|1=Emperor Bidatsu}} (Julian calendar {{ill|April 30|en|April 30|qid=Q2536|lt=April 30|1=April 30}} , {{ill|572|en|572|qid=Q49189|lt=572|1=572}} ) – Prince {{ill|Wakugōda|ja|訳語田皇子|qid=Q135491362|1=Emperor Bidatsu}} , second son of {{ill|Emperor Kinmei|en|Emperor Kinmei|qid=Q329792|lt=Emperor Kinmei|1=Emperor Kinmei}} , ascends the throne as the 30th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} , known as {{ill|Emperor Bidatsu|en|Emperor Bidatsu|qid=Q316637|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|1=Emperor Bidatsu}} . * Year 12 of {{ill|Empress Suiko|1=Empress Suiko|2=ja|3=推古天皇|ja|Empress Suiko|1=Empress Suiko|2=ja|3=推古天皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Suiko|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q298057}} (Julian calendar {{ill|May 6|en|May 6|qid=Q2552|lt=May 6|1=May 6}} , {{ill|604|en|604|qid=Q31048|lt=604|1=604}} ) – {{ill|Prince Shōtoku|en|Prince Shōtoku|qid=Q263972|lt=Prince Shōtoku|1=Prince Shōtoku}} promulgates the {{ill|Seventeen-article constitution|en|Seventeen-article constitution|qid=Q197248|lt=Seventeen-article constitution|1=Seventeen-article constitution}} . * Year 6 of {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|qid=Q1373026|lt=Wadō|1=Wadō (era)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|May 1|en|May 1|qid=Q2544|lt=May 1|1=May 1}} , {{ill|713|en|713|qid=Q23523|lt=713|1=713}} ) – The provinces of {{ill|Tango Province|en|Tango Province|qid=Q1054331|lt=Tango Province|1=Tango Province}} , {{ill|Mimasaka Province|en|Mimasaka Province|qid=Q936036|lt=Mimasaka Province|1=Mimasaka Province}} , and {{ill|Ōsumi Province|en|Ōsumi Province|qid=Q981002|lt=Ōsumi Province|1=Ōsumi Province}} are established. * Year 1 of {{ill|Ten'ō|en|Ten'ō|qid=Q1373125|lt=Ten'ō|1=Ten'ō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|April 30|en|April 30|qid=Q2536|lt=April 30|1=April 30}} , {{ill|781|en|781|qid=Q31175|lt=781|1=781}} ) – Prince Yamabe ascends the throne as the 50th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} , known as {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|en|Emperor Kanmu|qid=Q314846|lt=Emperor Kanmu|1=Emperor Kanmu}} . * Year 1 of {{ill|Gen'ei|en|Gen'ei|qid=Q1193613|lt=Gennō|1=Gen'ei}} (Julian calendar {{ill|April 25|en|April 25|qid=Q2531|lt=April 25|1=April 25}} , {{ill|1118|en|1118|qid=Q19539|lt=1118|1=1118}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Eikyū (Japan)|ja|永久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eikyū (Japan)|1=Eikyū (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q16277931}} to {{ill|Gen'ei|en|Gen'ei|qid=Q1193613|lt=Gennō|1=Gen'ei}} . * Year 1 of {{ill|Tenji (era)|en|Tenji (era)|qid=Q1150846|lt=Tenchō|1=Tenji (era)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|May 18|en|May 18|qid=Q2576|lt=May 18|1=May 18}} , {{ill|1124|en|1124|qid=Q23714|lt=1124|1=1124}} ) – Following the enthronement of {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|en|Emperor Sutoku|qid=Q349287|lt=Emperor Sutoku|1=Emperor Sutoku}} , the era name changes from {{ill|Hōan|en|Hōan|qid=Q1194464|lt=Hōan|1=Hōan}} to {{ill|Tenji (era)|en|Tenji (era)|qid=Q1150846|lt=Tenchō|1=Tenji (era)}} . * Year 10 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|April 25|en|April 25|qid=Q2531|lt=April 25|1=April 25}} , {{ill|1582|en|1582|qid=Q6719|lt=1582|1=1582}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} burns down {{ill|Erin-ji|en|Erin-ji|qid=Q6430158|lt=Erin-ji|1=Erin-ji}} in {{ill|Enzan, Kōshū|ja|塩山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enzan, Kōshū|1=Enzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q15891754}} , for harboring remnants of the {{ill|Takeda clan|en|Takeda clan|qid=Q1210114|lt=Takeda clan|1=Takeda clan}} . * Year 18 of Tenshō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|May 6|en|May 6|qid=Q2552|lt=May 6|1=May 6}} , {{ill|1590|en|1590|qid=Q6764|lt=1590|1=1590}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} ’s massive army lays siege to {{ill|Odawara Castle|en|Odawara Castle|qid=Q1013437|lt=Odawara Castle|1=Odawara Castle}} , where the {{ill|Later Hōjō clan|en|Later Hōjō clan|qid=Q431928|lt=Hōjō clan (Late)|1=Later Hōjō clan}} is resisting. * Year 1 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|April 25|en|April 25|qid=Q2531|lt=April 25|1=April 25}} , {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} ) – {{ill|Fukuzawa Yukichi|en|Fukuzawa Yukichi|qid=Q355447|lt=Fukuzawa Yukichi|1=Fukuzawa Yukichi}} relocates his English studies school from Edo’s Teppōzu to Shiba Shinzaka, renaming it {{ill|Keio Gijuku (Gakkō Hōjin)|en|Keio Gijuku (Gakkō Hōjin)|qid=Q6420636|lt=Keio University|1=Keio Gijuku (Gakkō Hōjin)}} . == Births == * Year 10 of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|May 15|en|May 15|qid=Q2562|lt=May 15|1=May 15}} , {{ill|1839|en|1839|qid=Q7616|lt=1839|1=1839}} ) – {{ill|Nakahara Nantenbō|en|Nakahara Nantenbō|qid=Q927161|lt=Nakahara Tōshū|1=Nakahara Nantenbō}} , {{ill|Zen|ja|禅Monk|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. {{ill|1925|en|1925|qid=Q18107|lt=1925|1=1925}} ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|May 14|en|May 14|qid=Q2561|lt=May 14|1=May 14}} , {{ill|1850|en|1850|qid=Q7653|lt=1850|1=1850}} ) – {{ill|Murayama Ryūhei|ja|村山龍平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murayama Ryūhei|1=Ryōhei Murayama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11523170}} , founder of {{ill|The Asahi Shimbun|en|The Asahi Shimbun|qid=Q720503|lt=Asahi Shimbun|1=The Asahi Shimbun}} (d. {{ill|1933|en|1933|qid=Q18726|lt=1933|1=1933}} ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|May 6|en|May 6|qid=Q2552|lt=May 6|1=May 6}} , {{ill|1856|en|1856|qid=Q7676|lt=1856|1=1856}} ) – {{ill|Kazuo Hatoyama|en|Kazuo Hatoyama|qid=Q289116|lt=Hatoyama Kazuo|1=Kazuo Hatoyama}} , {{ill|House of Representatives (Japan)|ja|衆議院議員|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/House of Representatives (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の国会議員|1=Member of Parliament (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q28692897}} , father of {{ill|Ichirō Hatoyama|en|Ichirō Hatoyama|qid=Q333589|lt=Hatoyama Ichirō|1=Ichirō Hatoyama}} (d. {{ill|1911|en|1911|qid=Q2076|lt=1911|1=1911}} ). == Deaths == * Year 3 of {{ill|Kōji (Muromachi period)|en|Kōji (Muromachi period)|qid=Q1143910|lt=Kōji|1=Kōji (Muromachi period)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|May 1|en|May 1|qid=Q2544|lt=May 1|1=May 1}} , {{ill|1557|en|1557|qid=Q6595|lt=1557|1=1557}} ) – {{ill|Ōuchi Yoshinaga|en|Ōuchi Yoshinaga|qid=Q8081787|lt=Ōuchi Yoshinaga|1=Ōuchi Yoshinaga}} , {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q117415390}} lord of {{ill|Suō Province|ja|Suō Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suō Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * Year 10 of Tenshō (Julian calendar {{ill|April 25|en|April 25|qid=Q2531|lt=April 25|1=April 25}} , {{ill|1582|en|1582|qid=Q6719|lt=1582|1=1582}} ) – {{ill|Kaisen Joki|en|Kaisen Joki|qid=Q6348356|lt=Kaisan Jōki|1=Kaisen Joki}} , a monk of the {{ill|Rinzai school|en|Rinzai school|qid=Q639625|lt=Rinzai school|1=Rinzai school}} . * Year 1 of {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|qid=Q1145735|lt=Enpō|1=Enpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|May 19|en|May 19|qid=Q2578|lt=May 19|1=May 19}} , {{ill|1673|en|1673|qid=Q7617|lt=1673|1=1673}} ) – {{ill|Ingen|en|Ingen|qid=Q705266|lt=Ingen Ryūki|1=Ingen}} , a Zen monk from the {{ill|Ming dynasty|en|Ming dynasty|qid=Q9903|lt=Ming dynasty|1=Ming dynasty}} , founder of Japan’s {{ill|Ōbaku|en|Ōbaku|qid=Q384728|lt=Ōbaku school|1=Ōbaku}} (b. {{ill|1592|en|1592|qid=Q6769|lt=1592|1=1592}} ). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|2|4|4|3|3|5|4|0403|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
